text: That the disciples do not mention the appearance of our Lord himself to the women (Mt. 28.9) is perhaps due to their incredulity (Mk. 16.11).
‘And shared his meal with them’; literally, ‘took what remained and gave it to them’. These words do not occur in the Greek manuscripts.
vv. 46-53: St Luke does not here mention the interval of forty days before the Ascension, although he certainly knew of it (Ac. 1.3).
